str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - coding-beginners
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Strategies for Dealing with Overwhelming Coding Concepts
entry.summary: In today's digital age, coding has become an essential skill for many career paths. However, learning coding concepts can be overwhelming, especially for beginners who are drowning in information. This blog post offers ten strategies to help overcome this challenge and master even the most complex coding concepts. By breaking things down, practicing consistently, using online resources, collaborating with others, taking breaks, learning visualization techniques, applying concepts to real-world scenarios, testing your knowledge, learning debugging techniques, and celebrating small wins, you can build a strong foundation in coding and stay motivated throughout the journey. With these strategies, we hope to inspire and support coders of all levels on their learning journeys!

entry.title: How to Learn Coding Without Feeling Overwhelmed
entry.summary: In this blog post, titled "How to Learn Coding Without Feeling Overwhelmed," we explore ten tips for those who want to learn coding without becoming overwhelmed by the process. The author emphasizes starting with the basics, breaking tasks down into smaller pieces, practicing consistently, focusing on understanding rather than memorization, and seeking out resources when needed. Additionally, the post encourages setting realistic goals, learning from mistakes, embracing failure, and remembering the big picture. By following these tips, anyone can develop their coding skills gradually and enjoyably without feeling overwhelmed by frustration or confusion. The author invites readers to share this post with others who may be interested in learning more about coding and other technical skills, as we strive together to help more people unlock the benefits of these essential skills!
